footer.title: Meeting Brain — AI meeting analysis for project teams
footer.description:
Paste meeting notes, generate structured reports,
and export action items in seconds.
footer.stack: Built with React • Gemini AI • Netlify

errors.reportTimeout: The report request timed out. Retry to try again.
errors.reportNetwork: The report request failed because the network is unavailable.
errors.reportInvalidResponse: The report service returned an unreadable response.
errors.reportSchemaInvalid: The generated report did not match the expected schema.
errors.fileReadFailed: Unable to read the uploaded file.
errors.fileTypeUnsupported: Unsupported file type. Upload a PDF, DOCX, TXT, or MD file.
errors.transcriptRequired: Transcript is required before generating a report.
errors.transcriptTooShort: Transcript must be at least 20 characters.
errors.transcriptTooLong: Transcript must be 20,000 characters or fewer.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.body: The route does not exist in this MVP. Core functionality lives on the main workspace.

errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong while rendering the workspace.
errorBoundary.body: Reload the page to recover. If the issue persists, review the latest changes before continuing.
